overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night in a video game. The player follows a narrow dirt path illuminated by a flashlight, navigating through trees and underbrush before approaching and passing a large rock formation on the right.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path, illuminating the way ahead with a flashlight

entered.detail: tall straight trunks of pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees on the right side of the forest path
narrow dirt trail covered with pine needles and leaves
thick bushes and ferns alongside the path edge
thick vegetation and underbrush on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dense forest at night. The path is narrow and winding, flanked by tall pine trees and thick undergrowth on both sides. The scene is illuminated only by a flashlight, creating deep shadows and a cool, dark atmosphere typical of a survival game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path alongside large rock formation

events.description: camera pushes through low-hanging branches and leaves that temporarily obscure the view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while passing close to a large rock wall on the right side

entered.detail: massive boulder or rock wall rising beside the path on the right side
leafy branches hanging at eye level that the camera passes through

segments.scene_description: The path continues alongside a massive rock formation that dominates the right side of the frame. The camera briefly passes through obstructing foliage at the start of the segment, then proceeds along the trail with the rock wall on the right and forest continuing on the left. The atmosphere remains dark and enclosed, with the flashlight revealing textures of stone and vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that transitions from a dense thicket of trees to a narrow passage alongside a massive stone wall. It begins by winding along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the deep shadows of towering pine trees and thick undergrowth. As the camera pushes forward, it briefly brushes through obstructing foliage before the environment opens slightly to reveal a towering rock formation dominating the right side of the frame. The scene then proceeds along the trail, shifting the focus from the surrounding woods to the rugged textures of the stone wall while maintaining a cool, dark atmosphere.
